name: Thai-Style Chicken and Vegetable Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut crosswise into 1/2-inch-thick slices
1 tablespoon Thai red curry paste (or 2 tablespoons chili-garlic sauce)
2 large Japanese eggplants, cut into 3/4-inch pieces
4 ounces green beans, trimmed and cut diagonally into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir chicken and curry paste in a medium bowl to coat. Set aside.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add eggplant and green beans to the skillet. Stir-fry until the eggplant begins to soften, about 4 minutes.
4. Add another tablespoon of oil to the skillet, then add the chicken mixture.
5. Stir-fry until the chicken begins to brown, about 3 minutes.
6. Add coconut milk; simmer until the beans are tender and the chicken is cooked through, and the sauce thickens slightly, about 3 minutes.
7. Season with salt.
8. Sprinkle with basil.
